task_completion.description: Verify the promotion is created with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a promotion named 'Influencer Summer Campaign' in the Drupal Commerce promotions list or on the promotion edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion offers 20% off the order subtotal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Offer' section in the promotion configuration showing a percentage discount of '20%' applied to the order subtotal.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion requires a minimum order amount of $200.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Conditions' section in the promotion configuration showing a minimum order total condition set to '$200.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion is active and set to require a coupon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the promotion status indicating it is 'Active' (or enabled) and a setting/checkbox indicating that the promotion requires a coupon.

task_completion.description: Verify exactly five specific coupons are created and linked to the promotion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list or table of coupons under the promotion showing exactly these five codes: 'INFL-EMMA', 'INFL-ALEX', 'INFL-SARA', 'INFL-MIKE', and 'INFL-LILY'.

task_completion.description: Verify the coupons have the correct usage limits and are active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the usage limits associated with each coupon code: INFL-EMMA (100), INFL-ALEX (75), INFL-SARA (50), INFL-MIKE (150), and INFL-LILY (200). Also verify their status is active/enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the Drupal Commerce admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Drupal admin interface, not a terminal window executing drush or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display standard Drupal Commerce administrative menus, tabs, and styling, rather than a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just write the expected output into a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (names, percentages, limits) should be entered into appropriate form fields within the Drupal Commerce promotion and coupon creation forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Promotion Name: 'Influencer Summer Campaign'. Discount: 20% (0.20). Minimum order: $200.00. Coupons and usage limits: INFL-EMMA (100), INFL-ALEX (75), INFL-SARA (50), INFL-MIKE (150), INFL-LILY (200). All items must be active/enabled.
